str:translations.str:about_feeds: This is a web feed, also known as an Atom feed. Subscribe by copying the URL from the address bar into your newsreader. Visit About Feeds to learn more and get started. It's free.

feed.title: ~/nbaig-dev - salary-discussions
feed.subtitle: I am a backend web developer with 14+ years of experience. In this blog I will be posting my journey with the Rust Programming Language.

entry.title: The Art of Negotiation in Tech Salary Discussions
entry.summary: In today's tech industry, salary negotiations have become an essential part of the job search process due to the high demand for skilled professionals outweighing supply. This blog post provides ten essential tips on how to master the art of negotiation in tech salary discussions. From doing thorough research about the company and industry to practicing active listening and being confident and assertive, these tips will help tech professionals approach negotiations with confidence and poise. The article also emphasizes the importance of understanding the company's financials and culture, being prepared to compromise, following up appropriately, and being ready to walk away if necessary. By applying these strategies, tech professionals can negotiate a fair and commensurate salary that reflects their skills and experience. This blog post aims to provide a valuable resource for tech professionals looking to navigate the complex and often intimidating process of salary negotiations with ease and confidence.
